Reading the room

Quick cues from how working DJs steer a floor:

Lift — nudge tempo up 2–3 BPM, go A→B, or +1 on the wheel
Cool — ease tempo down, go B→A, longer blends
Energy boost — +2 or +7 on the wheel at a drop, short blend + EQ
Phrase it — switch on 16/32-beat phrase boundaries

Peak-time sweet spot is roughly 126–132 BPM. Build in waves — tension then release — rather than holding one level.

Camelot quick rules

Same code — perfect blend
Same number, A↔B — relative major/minor
±1 number — smooth, same letter
±2 / +7 — energy shift (looser)

A = minor, B = major. 8A blends with 8A, 8B, 7A, 9A.

Import & update

Drop in your latest Promo Only export to add new songs, or a key file from rekordbox / Serato / Engine DJ / Mixed In Key to fill in keys. It reads both comma CSVs and rekordbox's tab-separated .txt export (Unicode included). Key files attach to your existing songs by title + artist — your whole library gets keyed, no duplicates, nothing you edited gets wiped.

Fix doubled / half BPM

Catalogue and detected tempos sometimes come in at double or half speed. Pick the range your tracks should sit in, and fold everything into it. The Mixer already cross-matches half/double-time regardless, but this tidies the numbers.

This also folds new mic/Analyze readings into the chosen range. Re-import your Promo Only file to restore originals if needed.

Fetch keys online

Pulls key (and BPM) from GetSongBPM's database for songs that don't have a key yet, matched by title + artist. Honest limits: it needs a free API key, it's rate-limited (works in batches), and it won't have every Promo Only instrumental or edit — so it fills what it can, and you key the rest from your audio.

Data from GetSongBPM.com. Tap once to set your free API key.

Appearance

Reset

Reload the original 13k starter songs, or wipe everything and start clean.

Tip: open this page in Chrome on your Pixel, tap ⋮ → Add to Home screen. It then opens like an app and works offline.

Detect keys from your audio

Pick the songs you've downloaded from Promo Only. Each one is analyzed right here — key + BPM — and written onto the matching track in your library, including every version of it. Nothing is uploaded anywhere.

Tip: start with the crate you actually play. You can correct any match or key before saving.

Key & BPM data powered by GetSongBPM.com
